reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://thewirecutter.com/reviews/best-slippers/ and extract every slipper they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category (Best Overall, Budget, etc.), price, materials, key features, pros with specific details, cons.

Go to https://www.travelandleisure.com/style/shoes/best-slippers and extract every slipper they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, materials, sole type, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.reviewed.com/canada/lifestyle/best-right-now/best-slippers-women-canada and extract every slipper they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price in CAD, materials, key features, pros, cons.

Go to https://www.instyle.com/best-slippers-8762704 and extract every slipper they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award category, price, materials, sole type, pros with specific test details, cons.

Go to https://www.guidespot.com/best-slippers/ and extract every slipper they rank. For each product get: full product name, their ranking and score, price, materials, sole type, pros with specific details, cons.
